results.term: Well, my fiance and I "sort of" broke up recently....

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, my fiance and I "sort of" broke up recently. I moved out of our place and all, but we continued to see each other at least 3X per week. And we both said we're not 100% sure that we're ok with us being done for good. - We promised to tell each other if we start dating anyone. He said he wasn't interested in dating. Three days after that conversation, I come over unexpectedly to find him making dinner for a woman I've never seen before. Turns out it was his 3rd date with her. He met her on a dating app a week before our conversation about promising to tell each other if we start dating others.

results.term: To be honest, I'd still be hurt if he told me. But...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: To be honest, I'd still be hurt if he told me. But now on top of that hurt, I feel disrespected... and everything I thought I knew about him is kind of crushed. We were together 6 years, and I always, ALWAYS believed he was the most honest, kind, "stand up guy" I've  ever known.

results.term: Yes, that's true. The worst part is that he doesn'...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, that's true. The worst part is that he doesn't seem to think I have a right to be hurt. How do I even deal with someone who hurt me but doesn't care to take any responsibility whatsoever?

results.term: That's true. He didn't invite me over. I expected ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That's true. He didn't invite me over. I expected him to be at work that night. I was coming over to see our cats, which still all lived with him. I still had a key and it didn't occur to me that I could invade his privacy since I had been spending 3X a week with him, and he was fine with me using the key. The whole thing was a shock. I wouldn't have come in had I known what I'd find inside.

results.term: Yeah. It's a long story to explain here, but at fi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yeah. It's a long story to explain here, but at first he told me it was a first date... then he said it was a second date... then finally he said it was a third date. I had to figure out on my own that he met her through a dating app, which makes me feel extra icky because now I kind of feel like a stalker. (Don't worry, I didn't do anything illegal or immoral to figure this out at all. He left an easy breadcrumb trail for me to follow.... but it still feels gross that I felt compelled to research the situation because I could "feel" he was lying.)

results.term: Yes. I'm not only invested in him. I have a SUPER ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes. I'm not only invested in him. I have a SUPER close relationship with his two daughters. Some of the reason he wanted to see me after our "break up" is because he didn't want to tell his daughters that I might be out of their lives forever. He told me so much.

results.term: And I love those girls so much.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And I love those girls so much.

results.term: They're 13 and 16. They were 7 and 11 when I start...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: They're 13 and 16. They were 7 and 11 when I started seeing their dad.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That's a good suggestion. I think individual therapy might benefit me. I could ask him if he's open to couple's counseling--even if it's over, it could help with closure.

results.term: I do. I appreciate your talking the time to listen...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I do. I appreciate your talking the time to listen to me. Sometimes just talking about an issue can help organize one's feelings and thoughts.

results.term: That is good advice. I haven't been eating or slee...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That is good advice. I haven't been eating or sleeping as well as I should since this all started. I'll work on that. --- Thank you so much for your time and help and kindness. :) I wish you a great weekend!

turn_info.content: Thank you!!! Take good care, stranger. I sincerely wish you the very best. <3
